name: Adobe Analytics
description: Connects to the Adobe Analytics 2.0 API to sync report suites, segments, and calculated metrics into the Shielva knowledge base. Authenticates via OAuth2 client_credentials grant using Adobe IMS.

install_fields.label: Client ID (API Key)
install_fields.help: Your Adobe Analytics OAuth2 Client ID (API Key). Found in Adobe Developer Console → Projects → Your Project → Credentials.

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.help: Your Adobe Analytics OAuth2 Client Secret. Keep this secure — it is never logged.

install_fields.label: Global Company ID
install_fields.help: Your Adobe Analytics Global Company ID. Used in all API URLs: analytics.adobe.io/api/{company_id}/...

install_fields.label: Organization ID
install_fields.help: Your Adobe IMS Organization ID (optional). Format: {hex}@AdobeOrg. Found in Adobe Admin Console.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate client_id, client_secret, and company_id. Acquires an OAuth2 access token via Adobe IMS client_credentials grant. Returns HEALTHY/CONNECTED or OFFLINE with reason.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Acquire token and list report suites to confirm connectivity. Returns HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE with report suite count.

methods.name: Sync
methods.description: Full sync: fetches all report suites, segments (for first report suite), and calculated metrics. Normalizes each to a ConnectorDocument. Non-primary failures are non-fatal.

methods.name: List Report Suites
methods.description: Return all report suites available for the company.

methods.name: List Dimensions
methods.description: Return all dimensions available for a specific report suite.

methods.name: List Metrics
methods.description: Return all metrics available for a specific report suite.

methods.name: List Segments
methods.description: Return all segments for a specific report suite.

methods.name: Run Report
methods.description: Run a ranked Adobe Analytics report for a report suite with given metrics, dimensions, and optional date range.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Acquire token and list report suites to verify connectivity.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync report suites, segments, and calculated metrics.

apis.name: List Report Suites
apis.description: Return all report suites for the company.

apis.name: List Dimensions
apis.description: Return all dimensions for a report suite.

apis.name: List Metrics
apis.description: Return all metrics for a report suite.

apis.name: List Segments
apis.description: Return all segments for a report suite.

apis.name: Run Report
apis.description: Run an Adobe Analytics ranked report.
